case_title: POURSHAYEGAN, ALI vs. GARLAND, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF POURSHAYEGAN, ALI AS TO DEFENDANT GARLAND, JOHN SULLIVAN JANE DOES 1 THROUGH 10 STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-24-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-28-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-05-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-24-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-24-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR AUG-23-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-23-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-23-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. FAILURE TO APPEAR AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE MAY RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-15-1996 CONTINUED FROM AUG-23-1996 TO SEP-23-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
